name: Hainan Haiqi Transportation Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hainan Haiqi Transportation Group Co.,Ltd. operates as a road transportation company in China. It offers passenger transport, logistics express delivery, taxi and tourist passenger transportation, car maintenance, and other services. The company was formerly known as Hainan Haiqi Transportation Group Limited. The company was founded in 1951 and is based in Haikou, China.
